summary: Frontend testing completed for admin panel fixes. All tests passed: (1) Admin login with credentials aditya/doggy2026 works correctly, (2) Tab organization verified - tabs are organized into three groups: CORE TOOLS (Dashboard, Orders, Fulfilment, Customers, Pet Profiles, Service Desk, Loyalty, Reports, Mira Chats, Reviews), PILLAR TOOLS (Celebrate, Collections, Custom Cakes, Dine, Blog, Testimonials, FAQs), OPERATIONS (Discounts, Abandoned, Autoship, Streaties, Franchise), (3) CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: Dine tab loads DineManager component WITHOUT prompting for additional authentication - restaurant list loads automatically with 19 restaurants, (4) Service Desk tab loads correctly with metrics bar, filters, and ticket list.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth restoration fix in Admin.jsx lines 296-313 correctly decodes base64 adminAuth from localStorage and restores username/password states
DineManager receives credentials prop correctly: <DineManager credentials={{ username, password }} />
Tab organization uses three labeled groups with dividers for clear visual separation
ServiceDesk component receives authHeaders prop and loads ticket data correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel auth restoration fix verified. Dine tab bug is fixed - clicking Dine tab no longer prompts for authentication. Tab organization into CORE TOOLS, PILLAR TOOLS, OPERATIONS groups is working. Service Desk shows 4 tickets with proper metrics and filters.

frontend_ui_tests.tab_organization_core_tools: PASS - All 10 CORE TOOLS tabs present (Dashboard, Orders, Fulfilment, Customers, Pet Profiles, Service Desk, Loyalty, Reports, Mira Chats, Reviews)
frontend_ui_tests.tab_organization_pillar_tools: PASS - All 7 PILLAR TOOLS tabs present (Celebrate, Collections, Custom Cakes, Dine, Blog, Testimonials, FAQs)
frontend_ui_tests.tab_organization_operations: PASS - All 5 OPERATIONS tabs present (Discounts, Abandoned, Autoship, Streaties, Franchise)
frontend_ui_tests.dine_tab_bug_fix: PASS - DineManager loads WITHOUT auth prompt, shows 19 restaurants
frontend_ui_tests.dine_tab_features: PASS - Add Restaurant, Export CSV, Import CSV, Search, Refresh buttons all present
frontend_ui_tests.dine_tab_stats: PASS - Shows Total Restaurants (19), With Pet Menu (12), Partial Menu (6), Birthday Perks (5), Featured (11)
frontend_ui_tests.servicedesk_tab_metrics: PASS - Shows Open Tickets (4), Critical (1), High Priority (1), Overdue (0), Last 24h (4)
frontend_ui_tests.servicedesk_tab_filters: PASS - Search, Status, Category, Urgency filters present
frontend_ui_tests.servicedesk_tab_tickets: PASS - Ticket list shows 4 tickets with urgency badges
frontend_ui_tests.servicedesk_tab_actions: PASS - Refresh, Categories, Settings, New Ticket buttons present

dine_tab_auth_bug.description: Previously clicking Dine tab would incorrectly prompt for authentication even after successful login
dine_tab_auth_bug.fix_location: Admin.jsx lines 296-313 - useEffect hook now decodes stored base64 auth and restores username/password states
dine_tab_auth_bug.verification: DineManager component loads immediately with restaurant data, no auth prompt appears
